title: Karpaka Vinayakar Temple
tagline: Karpaka Vinayakar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Karpaka Vinayaka Temple or Pillaiyarpatti Pillaiyar Temple is a 7th-century-CE rock-cut cave shrine, significantly expanded over the later centuries.
overview.description: Karpaka Vinayaka Temple or Pillaiyarpatti Pillaiyar Temple is a 7th-century-CE rock-cut cave shrine, significantly expanded over the later centuries. It is located in Pillayarpatti village in Tiruppathur Taluk, Sivaganga district in Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Karpaka Vinayakar (Ganesha). In the cave temple, there are rock cut images of Ganesha, Siva linga and another carving that has been variously identified as Ardhanarishwara or Harihara or the early king between them who built this temple.

topPlaces.name: Kundrakudi
topPlaces.description: Kundrakudi is a village in Sivaganga district that houses a famous Murugan temple, Shanmughanathar Temple, atop a small hill near Karaikudi, India. The place is also known as Kunnakudi.

topPlaces.name: Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi
topPlaces.description: Kunnakudi Shanmughanathar temple (also called Kunnakudi Temple or Kunnakudi Murugan Temple) in Kundrakudi, a village in the outskirts of Karaikudi in Sivaganga district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Murugan. Constructed in the Hindu style of architecture, the temple is located in the Tirupattur - Karaikudi Road, around 14 km (14,000 m) from Karaikudi.

topPlaces.name: Nachiapuram
topPlaces.description: Nachiapuram is a village located in Sivagangai District in the State of Tamil Nadu in India. Nachiapuram is a panchayat with elected members, and forms part of the Kallal Union.

topPlaces.name: Tiruppattur, Sivaganga
topPlaces.description: Tiruppattur, also spelt Tiruppathur or Thiruppathur, is a Taluk, Town Panchayat in Sivaganga district in the India state of Tamil Nadu. This town is located 22 km from Karaikudi and 27 km from Sivaganga.

topPlaces.name: Tiruttalinathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruttalinathar temple is a Siva temple located in Thiruputhur near Karaikkudi. This temple is regarded as the 6th of the Tevara Stalams in the Pandya kingdom of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Palavangudi
topPlaces.description: Palavangudi is a rural village located in the southern-most state of Tamil Nadu in the Republic of India. Palavangudi is one of 44 panchayat villages in the Sivaganga District's Kallal revenue block.

topPlaces.name: Kandiramanickkam, Tiruvarur
topPlaces.description: Kandiramanickkam is a village in the Thirupathur taluk of Sivagangai district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kattubava Mosque
topPlaces.description: The Kattubava Mosque, also known as the Kattubava Pallivasal, is a Sufi mosque located in the village of Kathvapallivasal, in the Pudukkottai district of the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The mosque is situated 30 kilometres (19 mi) from Pudukkottai on the Thirumayam-Madurai highway.

items.note: Kundrakudi is a village in Sivaganga district that houses a famous Murugan temple, Shanmughanathar Temple, atop a small hill near Karaikudi, India. The place is also known as Kunnakudi.

Kunnakudi Shanmughanathar temple (also called Kunnakudi Temple or Kunnakudi Murugan Temple) in Kundrakudi, a village in the outskirts of Karaikudi in Sivaganga district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Murugan. Constructed in the Hindu style of architecture, the temple is located in the Tirupattur - Karaikudi Road, around 14 km (14,000 m) from Karaikudi.
Nachiapuram is a village located in Sivagangai District in the State of Tamil Nadu in India. Nachiapuram is a panchayat with elected members, and forms part of the Kallal Union.

Tiruppattur, also spelt Tiruppathur or Thiruppathur, is a Taluk, Town Panchayat in Sivaganga district in the India state of Tamil Nadu. This town is located 22 km from Karaikudi and 27 km from Sivaganga.
Tiruttalinathar temple is a Siva temple located in Thiruputhur near Karaikkudi. This temple is regarded as the 6th of the Tevara Stalams in the Pandya kingdom of Tamil Nadu.
Palavangudi is a rural village located in the southern-most state of Tamil Nadu in the Republic of India. Palavangudi is one of 44 panchayat villages in the Sivaganga District's Kallal revenue block.
Kandiramanickkam is a village in the Thirupathur taluk of Sivagangai district in Tamil Nadu, India.

The Kattubava Mosque, also known as the Kattubava Pallivasal, is a Sufi mosque located in the village of Kathvapallivasal, in the Pudukkottai district of the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The mosque is situated 30 kilometres (19 mi) from Pudukkottai on the Thirumayam-Madurai highway.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Karpaka Vinayakar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Karpaka Vinayakar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Karpaka Vinayakar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (64 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Karpaka Vinayakar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Karpaka Vinayakar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Karpaka Vinayakar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Karpaka Vinayakar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Karpaka Vinayakar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kundrakudi, Shanmughanathar Temple, Kunnakudi, Nachiapuram, Tiruppattur, Sivaganga, Tiruttalinathar Temple.
